name: mcp-rubber-duck
description: Query multiple LLMs in parallel from AI coding tools. Ask a question to OpenAI, Gemini, Groq, or any OpenAI-compatible API — and CLI agents like Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini CLI — then compare answers, run consensus votes, structured debates, and judge evaluations. Rubber duck debugging, but the ducks talk back.
